# Drossfront single-squad path-time baseline
# Generated by tools/movement_baseline.gd — fill in MANUAL_RECORD entries by running
# scenes/test_arena.tscn and stopwatching arrival of each ground unit class moving
# from (-40, 0, -40) to (40, 0, 40).
# Format: unit_name<TAB>time_sec or MANUAL_RECORD
